ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of stocks traded on the given date */,
  "daily_returns" REAL /* Daily return calculated from closing prices */,
  "monthly_moving_avg" REAL /* Monthly moving average of closing prices */,
  "quarterly_moving_avg" REAL /* Quarterly moving average of closing prices */,
  "yearly_moving_avg" REAL /* Yearly moving average of closing prices */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lagged_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lagged record */,
  "stock_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated stock data record */,
  "lag_1" REAL /* Value of the stock data lagged by one time period */,
  "lag_2" REAL /* Value of the stock data lagged by two time periods */,
  "lag_3" REAL /* Value of the stock data lagged by three time periods */,
  "lag_4" REAL /* Value of the stock data lagged by four time periods */,
  "lag_5" REAL /* Value of the stock data lagged by five time periods */,
  "lag_6" REAL /* Value of the stock data lagged by six time periods */,
  "lag_7" REAL /* Value of the stock data lagged by seven time periods */,
  "lag_8" REAL /* Value of the stock data lagged by eight time periods */,
  "lag_9" REAL /* Value of the stock data lagged by nine time periods */,
  "lag_10" REAL /* Value of the stock data lagged by ten time periods */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lagged_data_stock_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_data_id") REFERENCES stock_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated stock data record */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted closing price for the next time period */,
  "target" REAL /* Target value indicating the actual price to compare against */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the prediction (e.g., 95%, 99%) */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used for prediction (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_data_id") REFERENCES stock_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_info" (
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "dashboard_title" TEXT /* Title of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_content" TEXT /* Content or layout of the dashboard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to train the model */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
